creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
This is ready someone with a commit bit.  Build is clean in my Poudriere on both i386/amd64 jails with 11-CURRENT along with 10.1, 9.3, and 8.4 RELEASE.  Let's get this in so py-salt can be updated.

Only comment, adding this before commit:
NO_ARCH= yes

Will resolve these messages for Poudriere testport:
pkg-static: DEVELOPER_MODE: Notice: arch "FreeBSD:11:amd64" -- no architecture specific files found:

Thanks!
Jason
